creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)

When I filed the PR, I was using the latest snapshot of the ports tree, and the PR date is later than the date of mentioned fix, so I believe it was still an issue.

Although, I switched back to OpenSSL few weeks ago, so I won't be able to test any fixes.

Thanks!
